info.description: The /fund holdings section: exposure table, sectors table, and an origination panel. Holdings can also be pulled from the Fund Portfolio single type.

intro.description: Short intro paragraph above the tables.

panelHeading.description: Heading for the ice origination panel between the intro and the tables.

panelBody.description: Body text for the origination panel.

holdings.description: Exposure table rows (company + allocation). Leave empty to use the Fund Portfolio single type instead.

sectorsFootnote.description: Small print under the sectors table (optional).

footnotes.description: Small print under the exposure table (optional).

scheduleHref.description: Link target for 'For the detailed Portfolio Schedule, click here.' (optional).

portfolioSnapshot.description: Optional link to the Fund Portfolio single type (an alternative source for holdings).
